name: Mediterranean Chicken Melange
recipeIngredient: 3 each Thighs, chicken, broiler/ fryer, boned, skinned
8 each Drumsticks, chicken, broiler/ fryer, skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together mushrooms, onion, garlic, oil, tomato sauce, and tomato paste. Add wine, olives, salt, oregano, basil, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Place the chicken in a single layer, skin-side down, in a large baking dish. Spoon the sauce over the chicken; cover with foil. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
3. Turn the chicken; spoon sauce over the chicken and bake, uncovered, about 30 more minutes, or until chicken is fork tender.
4. Remove the chicken from the oven. Arrange artichoke hearts around the chicken. Sprinkle cheese over all. Cover loosely with foil and let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
5. When ready to serve, use warm serving plates. Mound pasta onto the plates first. Place the chicken onto the pasta and pour some pan juices over the chicken and pasta. Garnish with basil and black olives.
